This is a '''staging backlog''' for files uploaded by [[User:DPLA bot|DPLA bot]]
that duplicate existing Commons files and are awaiting deletion.

Files here have been identified as duplicates but are deliberately '''held back'''
from [[:Category:Duplicate]] to avoid flooding the speedy-deletion queue. They are
released into [[:Category:Duplicate]] a bounded number at a time — oldest first —
by an automated job, as administrators clear the previously released batch. See
[[Template:DPLA duplicate/doc]] for the mechanism.

Members are sorted oldest-first by a timestamp sort key. '''Administrators
normally do not need to act on this category directly''' — files become
actionable once they appear in [[:Category:Duplicate]]. Deleting files directly
from here is harmless but unnecessary.

{{hiddencat}}
[[Category:Files uploaded by DPLA bot| ]]
